# KonarCard

> KonarCard is a UK-based platform that helps tradespeople and service professionals replace paper business cards with NFC-enabled digital business cards and shareable profile links.

## About

KonarCard is both a SaaS platform and a physical product. Customers create a professional digital profile showcasing their services, photos, reviews, and contact details, then share it via:
- A unique shareable link (e.g. konarcard.com/u/their-name)
- A QR code
- A physical NFC card or key tag that opens their profile on tap

The aim is to help tradies turn conversations into booked jobs by replacing unreliable paper cards with a single, up-to-date, professional digital presence.

## Products

- [Plastic NFC Business Cards](https://www.konarcard.com/products) - £19.99 each, 6 colours (white, black, blue, green, magenta, orange)
- [Metal NFC Business Cards](https://www.konarcard.com/products) - £44.99, premium finish
- [KonarTag Key Tag](https://www.konarcard.com/products) - £9.99, pocket-friendly NFC tag

## Plans

- **Free** - 1 template, limited content (6 images, services, reviews), basic analytics
- **Plus** - £5/month, all templates unlocked, 12 images/services/reviews, full analytics
- **Teams** - Plus + £2/month per additional team profile
